parsed_review.summary: CP00-918 is a well-formed descriptor-only RP30 bridge pack (RiskWorkflow HRX tail x9 + HRApi foundation x1, RP30.P02.M10.S04-RP30.P03.M00.S01, 10 units, risk A). Verified via read-only inspection: (1) HRX_CP918_PACK_BINDING chains correctly CP917->CP918->CP919 and matches the plan entry, manifest plan_binding_snapshot, and live cursor; (2) registry domain rows plus HRX_NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION hard-code every runtime/write/payload/risk-score/HR-API/real-data/secret flag to false; (3) validators.js validateHrxCp918RiskHrApiFoundationBridgeDescriptor/Coverage and validateHrxPeopleContract enforce those boundaries, distribution counts, capabilities, safety gates, and no-leak guards; (4) model.test.js asserts the same boundaries and that the on-disk contract projection keeps CP00-918 current; (5) the contract JSON latest_projection/current_pack/latest_pack are CP00-918 with descriptor HrxCp918RiskHrApiFoundationBridgeDescriptor. Authority boundary holds: Claude is read-only and not final approver (claude_is_final_approval/promotes_claude_to_final_approval false), human approval required for runtime opening, and local validation does not claim enterprise trust. Hermes is used only for the deterministic evidence packet (emits_runtime_receipt false), not product runtime. Pack state is honest and non-overclaiming: manifest/command-evidence/inspection/adjudication/review-result all sit at production_ready=false / pending_review, with targeted HRX validation commands recorded at exit_code 0 and the npm scripts present. Unrelated dirty/untracked files are correctly excluded per changed-file-scope. No P0/P1/P2 issues found; one P3 informational note on the deferred full validation ladder. This review is independent read-only input and not final pack/goal approval authority.

findings.title: Full deterministic validation ladder deferred to post-review adjudication
findings.details: command-evidence records only the targeted HRX checks (node --check, node --test packages/hrx/test/*.test.js, rp30:hrx:validate, rp30:validate, hrx:requirements:validate, hrx:weighted:validate), all at exit_code 0, and explicitly defers the full deterministic ladder (closeout-pack-plan:validate, closeout-pack:validate, npm test, validate, spec:requirements:validate, weighted:validate, fullplan:validate, goal:closeout:validate, rp00:control-plane:validate, git diff --check) until review normalization and adjudication. As a read-only reviewer I cannot execute those commands, so the broader ladder is unverified at review time. This is the documented and expected pre-promotion sequence, not a defect; adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json, and claude-review-result.json all correctly remain PENDING/production_ready=false.
findings.recommendation: At closeout, run the full validation ladder, normalize the adjudication/construction-inspection/review-receipt artifacts from PENDING to the actual verdict, and confirm exactly one valid hardened read-only review receipt with no blocking findings before flipping production_ready and committing.
findings.post_review_disposition: Accepted as expected pre-promotion state; non-blocking. No code or boundary change required; closeout automation must still execute the full validation ladder and normalize adjudication/inspection/receipt before production_ready promotion.
